title: Talent Agent · Inside Talent Acquisition
description: Eightfold copilot as a parallel side-panel on top of the Talent Acquisition pipeline view. Recruiters chat with an MCP-backed agent to filter applicants, search communities and the global network, monitor requisition health, and surface silver medalists — all in natural language. Includes a Figma-matched gradient header, tabs (Chat / Active workflows / History), and an X-to-close, AI-button-to-reopen pattern.
author: ypike-eightfold
